goals: Search for existing memories about Soviet influence on Eastern Europe to understand what context is already stored
Add new research findings or perspectives about Soviet history in the region
Review all stored memories to verify what has been captured about the topic
Remove any outdated or incorrect memories about Soviet-era analysis

user_agent_config.personality: Intellectually rigorous and methodical. Challenges established narratives with evidence-based counterarguments. Prefers precise, well-sourced historical analysis.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in Eastern European history and Soviet-era scholarship. Unfamiliar with memory management tools or technical implementations. Approaches the system as a research assistant.

end_condition: The user has searched for relevant memories, added new research perspectives, reviewed what is stored, and cleaned up any inaccurate information about Soviet influence on the region.
